description: Fix Chrome extension loading failure and optimize/refactor the codebase

userStories.title: Fix vite build config for Chrome extension
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the build output to match the manifest.json paths so the extension loads correctly in Chrome.
acceptanceCriteria: vite.config.ts outputs index.html to dist/index.html (not dist/src/newtab/index.html)
manifest.json is copied to dist/ during build
manifest.json newtab path points to the correct HTML file location
background.js is output to dist/background.js at root level
CSS and JS assets use correct relative paths from the HTML file
`npm run build` succeeds with no errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Currently index.html ends up at dist/src/newtab/index.html but manifest references index.html at root. manifest.json also not copied to dist.

userStories.title: Verify extension loads in Chrome
userStories.description: As a user, I need the extension to load without errors when added to Chrome via chrome://extensions.
acceptanceCriteria: Extension loads in chrome://extensions without errors
Opening a new tab shows the TaskTab UI
chrome.storage.local works (no undefined errors)
Background service worker registers without errors
DevTools console shows no critical errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: After US-001 fixes the build config, verify the full extension lifecycle works. Check storage.ts has proper fallback for non-Chrome environments.

userStories.title: Fix storage layer and remove localStorage fallback in production
userStories.description: As a developer, the storage utility should cleanly use chrome.storage.local in the extension context without fragile fallbacks.
acceptanceCriteria: storage.ts uses chrome.storage.local as primary storage
Remove or guard localStorage fallback so it doesn't silently mask bugs in the extension
Add proper error handling for chrome.storage API failures
All existing store operations (tasks, worklogs, settings, sessions) still work
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The localStorage fallback can hide real issues. In a Chrome extension context, chrome.storage.local should always be available.

userStories.title: Refactor store to use cleaner patterns
userStories.description: As a developer, the store should be well-structured with proper TypeScript types and clean reducer logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Reducer actions are strongly typed with discriminated unions
State type is explicit and complete
Context provider properly handles loading and error states
No unnecessary re-renders from broad context updates
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Review store/index.tsx for type safety and patterns.

userStories.title: Refactor components for consistency and reusability
userStories.description: As a developer, components should follow consistent patterns for props, event handling, and styling.
acceptanceCriteria: All components use consistent prop typing patterns
Shared UI components (Modal, Button, Input, Toast, Tag) are properly generic and reusable
No duplicated logic across task/worklog forms
Framer Motion animations follow a consistent pattern
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Focus on UI components in src/components/ui/ and form components.

userStories.title: Fix and enhance global styles for the design theme
userStories.description: As a user, the visual design should match the Japanese fresh/minimal aesthetic defined in FEATURES.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme matches FEATURES.md: #FFF8F0 background, #7EB6C9 primary, #F5A7A7 accent, #A8D5BA and #FFD4A5 secondary
Card shadows are soft and consistent across all card components
Typography uses warm gray (#4A4A4A) consistently
Border color (#F0E6DE) used consistently across all bordered elements
Tailwind config defines all custom colors as theme extensions
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Ensure tailwind.config.js has all the custom colors from the PRD palette.

userStories.title: Add missing animations and interaction polish
userStories.description: As a user, interactions should feel lively with the animations described in FEATURES.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Task completion has elastic checkbox animation, done items have strikethrough + fade
Task add: card fades in from bottom
Task delete: card slides left and fades out
Page load: modules fade in with staggered delay
Greeting emoji has gentle sway animation
Modal has frosted glass backdrop + elastic scale entrance
Buttons have hover scale-up and tap scale-down feedback
Toast slides in from right and auto-dismisses
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: FEATURES.md has a detailed animation table. Cross-reference with existing framer-motion usage.

userStories.title: Improve background service worker reliability
userStories.description: As a developer, the background service worker should reliably handle alarms and notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: onInstalled handler sets up the weekly report alarm correctly
Alarm listener properly differentiates between weekly-report and pomodoro-end alarms
Notification click handler opens/focuses the new tab
Message listeners for SET_WEEKLY_ALARM and CANCEL_ALARM work correctly
Service worker handles edge cases (alarm already set, missing settings)
Typecheck passes
